visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink beret and a light blue striped shirt, stands in front of a colorful poster featuring anime characters from Ojamajo Doremi. She holds up a long, white paper receipt with an excited facial expression. The lighting is bright and uniform. (2) The woman is now wearing a white ruffled apron decorated with character patches on the front pockets. She smiles and points to the apron's details while standing in a living room with a brown leather sofa and wooden flooring. (3) She puts on pink oven mitts designed with magic circles and pulls a white bowl out of a white built-in oven. She looks directly at the camera with wide eyes and a joyous smile. (4) A close-up shot focuses on her feet wearing green plush slippers shaped like the character Majorika. She shifts her feet slightly on the wooden floor to show the slippers' texture. (5) Back in the living room, she holds up two large, character-shaped mesh laundry bags. She has added large heart-shaped earrings to her outfit and wears a black vest over her shirt. (6) She brings a pink drawstring bag close to the lens, opening it with her hands to reveal the soft pink inner lining. The bag features various magic-themed icons and a plastic circular emblem on the front. (7) She holds two square character coasters in their plastic packaging near her face. She smiles and speaks enthusiastically as the video ends. The camera remains mostly static throughout the cuts.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 小魔女doremi 購物開箱!. (2) [Subtitle]: 魔女圍裙 $850. (3) [Subtitle]: 魔女莉卡 小精靈 還有波隆轉換器. (4) [Subtitle]: 魔女隔熱手套 $390. (5) [Subtitle]: 魔女莉卡拖鞋 $500. (6) [Subtitle]: 小花 旋律轉換器洗衣袋 $299. (7) [Subtitle]: 魔女束口袋 $290. (8) [Subtitle]: 裡面還是刷絨的哦. [Variety]: 雙面圖案!. (9) [Subtitle]: 隨機大頭杯墊 $220. (10) [Subtitle]: 更多影片記得關注我們哦.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink beret, a striped blue and white shirt, and later a white apron or black vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a brown leather sofa, wooden floors, and a modern kitchen with a white oven and white cabinetry. An anime poster is used as a backdrop in the intro.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice speaks with rapid enthusiasm. Background music is a bright, upbeat synthesized pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. A sharp 'pop' sound effect is heard as the speaker begins. (2) Vocal delivery remains high-pitched and excited as she lists the first item. A 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of the price. The music continues with a cheerful melody. (3) A 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a scene change. The speaker's tone remains high-arousal. A faint mechanical sound of an oven door is heard beneath a celebratory 'sparkle' SFX. (4) A 'boing' cartoon-style sound effect plays. The narrator's speech is continuous and dense, maintaining a positive emotional valence. (5) Another 'pop' SFX triggers. The background music maintains its tempo. The speaker's voice is well-projected and clear. (6) Sound of slight fabric rustling is audible as she handles the bag. A soft 'ting' sound effect plays as text appears. Vocal pitch variability remains high. (7) Final segment features a friendly call-to-action. A short melodic stinger SFX plays at the end as the voice fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Items -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a specific collection of Ojamajo Doremi themed household merchandise, providing price information to inform and entertain fans of the series.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal purchase unboxing style with receipt shown.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social media content optimized for fan engagement through nostalgia and product pricing info.
